The '''Cranscoc''' were an [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cartao/Legends|Cartao]] who controlled [[Spaarti Creations]]. They reproduced slowly, and communicated by changing colors.

A sub-species known as '''Twillers''' controlled the strange fluid technology that earned [[Spaarti Creations]] their profits.

{{Species-stub}}
